description: Composition Grey melange round neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, with fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, short sleeve with print on the chest combined with embroidery Fitting Muscle Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery basics Play is here - for marathons and ball games. Sport the right gear, get the right accessory - Engage! Get into this basics t-shirt and feel the sport in you. Pair this with denims and canvas for a great rugged look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
